caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest, and a red and white neckerchief, stands before a microphone in an indoor setting featuring a backdrop of brown slatted walls. He is holding a guitar, though only the top part is visible. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with blonde and grey hair. The white text "ORCA" is displayed in the middle right of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man begins by singing into the microphone, then shifts his gaze downward toward his guitar, and finally looks back up toward the microphone. The people in the foreground remain still throughout the sequence, and the overall composition of the scene remains consistent.
